label: Quietus Sleeper Cell
description: Quietus Sleeper Cell constitutes a compact lodging chamber carved into the Polarized Cask’s sound-damping ribwork, sealed behind a pressure-rated iris panel. Its walls are lined with matte black-ceramic and prismatic inset strips that refract the port’s copper-white twilight into narrow, regulated bands. A recessed berth and fold-down work niche are integrated into vitrified glass cabinetry, their surfaces threaded with static-discharge channels that mirror Vesperglass System’s charged debris arcs. Vent baffles and condensate traps enforce the tavern’s defining hush, reducing mechanical resonance to a low, stable silence.
